htmlContent:
topoBuilder

Custom USGS Topographic Maps On Demand

Jo Baker National Map Liaison to VA, NC, SC, GA, & FL USGS National Geospatial Program September 2025 Joint Local Government and Federal Interagency Committee Meeting

topoBuilder is…

on demand

where you want

multi- scale

best available data

Choose map type

Zoom to area of interest

Choose map extent

Choose map layers

Choose export options

Add map(s) to cart

Review selections in cart

Edit map

Checkout (1)

Checkout (2)

Confirmation and delivery emails

OnDemand Topo Map Types

7.5-Minute Topo

  • 1:24,000 in CONUS & Hawai‘i
  • 1:25,000 in Alaska
  • 1:20,000 in Puerto Rico, U.S. Virgin Islands, American Samoa, Guam, Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands
  • Includes imagery and contour smoothing customization

Custom Map Extent

100K Topo

  • 1:100,000
  • Covers all states and territories
  • Planning, land management, recreation

100K Topo (2)

  • Five land cover classes
    • Woodland
    • Shrub/Scrub
    • Grassland
    • Crop/Pasture
    • Barren
  • No imagery

25K Recreational Topo

  • Closeups
  • New trail symbols
  • New boundary symbols
  • New point symbols
  • Updated contour intervals

Terra Water Snow National Terra

25K Recreational Topo (2)

  • 7.5-minute
  • 1:25,000
  • Recreation & outdoors
  • Excluded data
    • PLSS
    • Rails
    • Some structures
    • Oil & gas pipeline
    • Imagery

OnDemand Topo Comparison

26,194 North Carolina topoBuilder Requests 02/2022 - 01/2025

Resources – USGS.gov/topoBuilder

Resources – topoBuilder Help Tab

Thank you!

Jo Baker

National Map Liaison – VA, NC, SC, GA, FL

jmbaker@usgs.gov

For feedback, help, or support:

tnm_help@usgs.gov

topobuilder.nationalmap.gov

images.altText: USGS Science for a changing world logo
Clock icon representing on demand
Map pin icon representing where you want
Stacked pages icon representing multi-scale
Database icon representing best available data

Screenshot of the topoBuilder application showing the Map Types panel on the left with 7.5-Minute Topo, 25K Recreational Topo, and 100K Topo options. An arrow points to the 25K Recreational Topo option.
Screenshot of the topoBuilder application emphasizing the Maps panel on the left with the 'Zoom in to display Grid' toggle highlighted.
Screenshot showing the map extent selection tools, highlighting 'Custom Select' and the resulting blue grid selection on the map.
Screenshot of topoBuilder showing the 'Edit Layers' button highlighted, and a pop-up window listing customizable map layers like Geographic Names, Structures, Transportation, and Hydrography.
Screenshot showing the Format dropdown menu highlighted in the side panel, with PDF and TIFF options available.
Screenshot showing the 'Add' button highlighted at the bottom of the map configuration panel.

Screenshot of the topoBuilder application showing the Cart panel on the left. The Cart icon shows a badge with the number 3. The panel lists the maps added, including a 25K Topo and a 7.5-Minute Topo.
Screenshot showing pencil edit icons highlighted next to each map entry in the Cart panel.
Screenshot showing the green Checkout button highlighted at the bottom of the Cart panel.
Screenshot of topoBuilder Checkout interface showing an Export Succeeded confirmation dialog with order number 1710351563953675.
Screenshots of two USGS emails: an order confirmation email and a delivery email containing a map download link.
Examples of 7.5-Minute Topo maps showing topographic details.
Example of a custom map extent encompassing parts of four standard 7.5-minute quadrangles.
Example of a 100K Topo map and its detailed legend showing road classifications, hydrography, and structures.
Map excerpt identifying the five land cover classes: Woodland, Shrub/Scrub, Grassland, Crop/Pasture, and Barren.
Closeups of 25K Recreational Topo maps showing new trail lines, symbols for amenities, boundary styles, and updated contours.
Example of a complete 25K Recreational Topo map including an extensive recreation structures and trail legend.
Side-by-side comparison of different OnDemand Topo map scales and extents.

Dashboard showing a map of North Carolina with plotted topoBuilder requests and donut charts indicating: 100K Topo 17%, 7.5-Minute Topo 83%; TIFF 12%, PDF 88%; Layer Customization Yes 12%, No 88%; Custom Extent 38%, On-Grid 62%.
Screenshots of the USGS.gov/topoBuilder webpage showing information on creating OnDemand Topos, USGS Topo Maps, and topoBuilder Resources including User Guide and Release Notes.
Screenshot of the topoBuilder application map interface with the 'Help' tab circled in yellow on the left sidebar.
QR code linking to the topobuilder.nationalmap.gov website.
